description_long: This is a large, rectangular, industrial-style dumpster with a dark green, matte-finished metal body and a matching flat lid. The lid is hinged and features two visible black plastic or rubber handles for opening, with reinforced edges for durability. Four small black wheels are attached to the base, allowing for mobility across paved surfaces. The front panel displays a simple graffiti-style drawing, adding a touch of urban character. The side panels are plain, with subtle surface wear and minor scuff marks, indicating frequent use. The overall construction suggests it is designed for heavy-duty waste collection in public or commercial spaces.
description: A large, dark green metal dumpster with a flat hinged lid, black handles, and four wheels, featuring graffiti on the front panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graffiti drawing, lid details, and two wheels visible at the base.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the plain back panel, lid hinges, and two wheels; no graffiti visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the uninterrupted green surface, lid edge, and two wheels; handles and graffiti not visible.
description_view_3: Front-side view with partial graffiti visible, lid details, and two wheels; handle and hinge details apparent.
attribute_lid_type: flat, hinged, single-section metal lid with two black plastic handles and visible hinge mechanisms
attribute_handle_design: two black plastic bar handles on the front edge of the lid
